query:
UPDATE comms_messages
            SET
                updated_at = NOW(),
                edited_at = NOW(),
                deleted_at = CASE
                    WHEN $2 = false AND (content IS NULL OR content ~ '^[\s]*$') THEN NOW()
                    ELSE deleted_at
                END
            WHERE id = $1
            RETURNING
                id,
                channel_id,
                sender_id,
                content,
                created_at,
                updated_at,
                thread_id,
                edited_at::timestamptz AS "edited_at?",
                deleted_at::timestamptz AS "deleted_at?"
